_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Perform overwatch of targets before, during, and after a cyberspace operation.
reference_document_element_description: Establish post-deployment AI monitoring standards, including performance threshold definitions, drift detection protocols, incident reporting procedures, and remediation timelines.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI DG domain. DG-T-007 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-T-017 (AI, cosine: 0.362), SP-T-007 (SP, cosine: 0.344).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 2.0/10 (raw 0.202). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [cyberspace, operation, overwatch, perform, targets] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, definitions, deployment, detection, drift, establish] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.871 (P=0.884, R=0.858). P exceeds R by 0.025 — the DCWF element's 11 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 18 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Perform overwatch of targets before, during, and after a cyberspace operation." and "Establish post-deployment AI monitoring standards, including performance thresho" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.445 > STS 0.202 (gap +0.243). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [none] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 3.5%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [cyberspace, operation, overwatch, perform, targets]. WIDAI terms: [ai, definitions, deployment, detection, drift, establish].
